title: Stonehill College - Discover Your Purpose and Potential
body: I went to this college yesterday for an art program. I’ll be going there every Tuesday until dec 10, we had a scavenger hunt and I got to pet the librarian’s baby pig. The place was fun and the cafeterias are amazing. Will definitely be going there in the future.
author: @wocky2299

title: Stonehill College - Discover Your Purpose and Potential
body: I'm waiting for my Stonehill decision letter right now!! Ahhh! It's been my dream school since 6th grade!! Oh my goodness, its such a lovely school! It's the Disneyland of colleges!!
author: @kaitlinwilson3711

title: PROS AND CONS OF STONEHILL COLLEGE
body: super helpful video! Im planning on applying early decison for stonehill for next fall. Its my top school and looks like it would be amazing.
author: @jessikacm8985

title: PROS AND CONS OF STONEHILL COLLEGE
body: Great video I am from NC and looking for a change in scenery Stonehill College is on my list when I transfer out of community college
author: @mitchellbrydge3573

title: Stonehill - Day in the Life of Katherine
body: This is a great video. As a Stonehill Student and a fellow member of the class of 2012. I could not agree more with the whole person concept. It is a key piece of the Stonehill culture. From Spiritual development through campus ministry to community service through Into the Streets to fantastic faculty; Stonehill has all of the right pieces. I also love how Derek had to be in the video, Katherine.
author: @ordealman505
